description.en: Neuro-symbolic autonomous agent architecture with L2 metacognitive capabilities (2025-2026)
description.es: Arquitectura neuro-simbólica de agente autónomo con capacidades metacognitivas L2 (2025-2026)

P366.value: Autonomous agent with causal self-reference capabilities

value.label: CORTEX
value.description: Persistent error-state engine with structural scar memory

value.label: L2 Observer
value.description: Decoupled metacognitive middleware acting as prefrontal cortex

value.label: Autonomous Metacognitive Veto (AMV)
value.description: Causal intervention mechanism that vetoes failed patterns before execution

P1343.value: Functional Self-Reference in Autonomous Agents: Demonstrating L2 Metacognition via Causal Error Injection (arXiv, 2026)

submission_instructions: 2. Enter the label, description, and aliases
3. Add claims (properties) one by one using the Property IDs (P-codes)
4. For P527 (has parts), create sub-items for CORTEX and L2 Observer first
5. Update P2888 (exact match) once the arXiv paper has a DOI/URL
6. Add references to each claim pointing to the arXiv paper
prerequisites: The arXiv paper must be published first for source verification
The GitHub repository must be public
Consider creating separate Wikidata items for CORTEX and L2 Observer if notable
